$comment: One project in the apodictic.project_registry.v1 index. `id` is the stable registry handle (kebab-case); `title` is the human working title; `root` is the project root path relative to the workspace root (the directory containing .apodictic/) — the only fact the ambient model cannot otherwise recover. `volume` (default 1) and `series_root` support series. `mode` and `next_action` are denormalized copies of the project's Diagnostic_State.meta.json sidecar, present for fast listing but authoritative only in the sidecar (registry_check.py R3 surfaces drift, sidecar wins); `last_touched` is the registry's own bookkeeping and is not drift-checked. `lifecycle_node` is deliberately NOT stored here — it is derived on read (Increment 3). See docs/project-addressability.md.
title: APODICTIC project registry entry (apodictic.project_entry.v1)
